title: wolfhsm-sys: add extern C shim declarations; wolfhsm: add deps
description: Add extern C blocks for all shim functions (wolfhsm_ecc_*, wolfhsm_curve25519_*, wolfhsm_rsa_*, wolfhsm_mldsa_*, wolfhsm_aes_gcm_*, wolfhsm_sha256, wolfhsm_cmac) to wolfhsm-sys/src/lib.rs. Add Cargo features and deps to wolfhsm/Cargo.toml: features=[mldsa], no new crate deps needed for raw API.
